content: Priority Order: Explicit user flags override auto-detection.
Priority Order: Safety flags override optimization flags.
Priority Order: Performance flags activate under resource pressure.
Priority Order: Persona flags based on task patterns.
Priority Order: MCP server flags with context-sensitive activation.
Priority Order: Wave flags based on complexity thresholds.
`--plan`: Display execution plan before operations, showing tools, outputs, and step sequence.

`--think`: Enables multi-file analysis (~4K tokens) and Sequential MCP for structured problem-solving. Auto-activates for import chains >5 files or cross-module calls >10 references. Auto-enables `--seq` and suggests `--persona-analyzer`.

`--think-hard`: Enables deep architectural analysis (~10K tokens) with system-wide analysis and cross-module dependencies. Auto-activates for system refactoring, bottlenecks >3 modules, or security vulnerabilities. Auto-enables `--seq --c7` and suggests `--persona-architect`.

`--ultrathink`: Enables critical system redesign analysis (~32K tokens) for complex problems. Auto-activates for legacy modernization, critical vulnerabilities, or performance degradation >50%. Auto-enables `--seq --c7 --all-mcp`.
`--uc` / `--ultracompressed`: Provides 30-50% token reduction using symbols and structured output. Auto-activates when context usage >75% or for large-scale operations.
`--answer-only`: Provides a direct response without task creation or workflow automation. For explicit use only, no auto-activation.
`--validate`: Performs pre-operation validation and risk assessment. Auto-activates if risk score >0.7 or resource usage >75%.
`--safe-mode`: Enables maximum validation with conservative execution, blocking risky operations and forcing `--uc` mode. Auto-activates when resource usage >85% or in a production environment.
`--verbose`: Provides maximum detail and explanation, resulting in high token usage.
`--c7` / `--context7`: Enable Context7 for library documentation lookup. Auto-activates for external library imports or framework questions.
`--magic`: Enable Magic for UI component generation. Auto-activates for UI component requests or design system queries.
`--all-mcp`: Enable all MCP servers simultaneously. Auto-activates when problem complexity >0.8. Use judiciously due to higher token usage.
`--no-mcp`: Disable all MCP servers and use native tools only, resulting in 40-60% faster execution with WebSearch as a fallback.
`--no-[server]`: Disable a specific MCP server (e.g., --no-magic), resulting in 10-30% faster execution per disabled server.
`--delegate [files|folders|auto]`: Enable Task tool sub-agent delegation for parallel processing. Auto-activates for >7 directories or >50 files.
`--concurrency [n]`: Control the maximum number of concurrent sub-agents and tasks (default: 7, range: 1-15).
`--wave-mode [auto|force|off]`: Control wave orchestration activation. 'auto' activates based on complexity >0.8, file_count >20, and operation_types >2.
`--wave-strategy [progressive|systematic|adaptive|enterprise]`: Select the wave orchestration strategy, which is auto-selected based on project characteristics.
`--wave-delegation [files|folders|tasks]`: Control how the Wave system delegates work to Sub-Agents, integrating with the --delegate flag.
`--scope [file|module|project|system]`: Define the analysis scope from a single file to the entire system.
`--focus [performance|security|quality|architecture|accessibility|testing]`: Set the domain focus for the analysis.
`--loop`: Enable iterative improvement mode for commands like /improve or /refine. Auto-activates on refinement keywords, with a default of 3 iterations.
`--iterations [n]`: Control the number of improvement cycles (default: 3, range: 1-10), overriding the intelligent default.
`--interactive`: Enable user confirmation between improvement iterations, allowing for manual guidance.
`--persona-[type]`: Activate a specific persona to guide AI behavior, such as architect, frontend, backend, security, or mentor.
`--introspect` / `--introspection`: Enable a deep transparency mode that exposes the AI's thinking process with markers.
Flag Precedence: --no-mcp overrides all individual MCP flags.
Flag Precedence: The last specified persona takes precedence.
Wave Auto-Activation is triggered when complexity ≥0.7 AND files >20 AND operation_types >2.
Sub-Agent Auto-Activation is triggered for >7 directories OR >50 files OR complexity >0.8.
Loop Auto-Activation is triggered when polish, refine, enhance, or improve keywords are detected.
